_note: Maps a workflows.json guard NAME to an enforceable precondition check. workflows.json is the SINGLE SOURCE for guards (declared per transition); this file only says HOW to enforce a named guard. gen_guards.py reads each transition's guards[] and emits server/lib/transitionPreconditions.ts from these mappings. A guard declared in workflows but absent here is reported as 'declared but UNMAPPED' (a tracked enforcement gap) — never silently skipped.

school_active.error: School must be active to proceed.

payment_gate_passed.error: Payment gate not passed; cannot confirm slot assignment.

roster_gate_passed.error: Roster gate not passed; cannot confirm slot assignment.

capacity_gate_passed.error: Capacity gate not passed; cannot confirm slot assignment.

invalid_rows_zero.error: All invalid rows must be resolved before the roster can be validated.

blocking_duplicates_zero.error: Blocking duplicate rows must be resolved before the roster can be validated.

no_blocking_duplicates.error: Blocking duplicate rows must be resolved before the roster can be locked.
